name: ConfirmEngineerAppointment
description: Customer wants to confirm, check, or get details about a scheduled engineer visit or installation appointment — including verifying it's still booked, finding out the time or date, or requesting a confirmation notification. This is a pre-visit status check, not booking, rescheduling, cancelling, or reporting a problem with a visit.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Is my engineer appointment still booked?
Can you confirm my engineer is coming on {engineerAppointmentDate} ?
What time is my engineer coming?
I have an appointment on {engineerAppointmentDate} — is it still going ahead?
Is the engineer still coming today?
Confirm my installation appointment please
When is my engineer due to arrive?
I haven't received a confirmation for my engineer visit
Can you send me a confirmation for my appointment on {engineerAppointmentDate} ?
I just want to check my engineer is still booked for {engineerAppointmentDate}
What date is my installation scheduled for?
Is there definitely an engineer coming to my house today?
I booked an engineer but I haven't had any confirmation
Can you check if my appointment for {engineerAppointmentDate} is confirmed?
Where is my engineer — they should be here by now
What's the time window for my engineer visit?
I got a text about my engineer visit but I'm not sure if it's confirmed
Am I booked in for an engineer on {engineerAppointmentDate} ?
Nobody has contacted me about when the engineer is coming
Do I have an engineer appointment coming up?
I need to know what time the technician will be here on {engineerAppointmentDate}
confirm engineer appointment
